zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn於1399年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾時，她的父親Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn37歲，母親Mallt Verch Gruffydd38歲。她於1419年與Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas在菲律賓波霍爾度洛馬維結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1438年1月1日在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾卡馬特享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn于1399年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾时，她的父亲Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn37岁，母亲Mallt Verch Gruffydd38岁。她于1419年与Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas在菲律宾波霍爾度洛馬維结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1438年1月1日在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾卡馬特享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dwnn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Denne , a habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in Kent and Sussex with names derived from Middle English den ‘woodland swine-pasture’ (Old English denn), such as Denne Manor in Chilham, Denne Hill in Kingston, and Denne Court in Woodnesborough (Kent); Denne Park in Horsham, Denne in Warnham, and Dann's Farm in Willingdon (Sussex).
English: possibly from a pet form of   Denis  .

variants.name: Denne
meanings: French (mainly northern) and Walloon: probably a variant of Dhenne, a patronymic, with fused preposition d(e) ‘of’, from Henne, a pet form of the personal names French Henri, Flemish Hendrik (see Henry 1). Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Daine, the feminine form of Dain .

nameMeanings.name: Mabli
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn was born in 1399, in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn, was 37 and her mother, Mallt Verch Gruffydd, was 38. She married Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas in 1419, in Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Philippines. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 1 January 1438, in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn est née en 1399, à Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mallt Verch Gruffydd, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas en 1419, à Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Philippines. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1438, à Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn 1399 in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn 37 und ihre Mutter Mallt Verch Gruffydd 38. Sie hat 1419 in Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Philippinen Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1438 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn è nata il nel 1399 nel Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mallt Verch Gruffydd, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas nel 1419, nel Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Filippine. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1438, nel Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnnが1399年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランジェンデイルンで生まれた時，父Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnnは37歳，母Mallt Verch Gruffyddは38歳であった。1419年にフィリピンボhオルダエロマウィでSir Gruffudd ap Nicolasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1438年1月1日にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアカーマースンで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn(이)가 1399년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랭데언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mallt Verch Gruffydd(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1419년 필리핀 보홀 드로 마위에서 Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1438년 1월 1일 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 카마테에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn nasceu em 1399, em Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mallt Verch Gruffydd, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas em 1419, em Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Filipinas. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1438, em Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn родилась в 1399 г. в местности ллангендирн, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mallt Verch Gruffydd, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas в 1419 г. в местности мави, дуиро, бохол, Филиппины. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 1 января 1438 г. в местности кармартен, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn nació en 1399, en Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mallt Verch Gruffydd, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas en 1419, en Mawi, Duero, Bohol, Filipinas. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1438, en Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años.
